name: Telegram Group Manager Bot
description: Advanced Telegram group manager bot with auto-deleting welcome messages, admin tools (kick, ban, mute, warn, purge, pin) and Heroku webhook support.

WEBHOOK_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL — set this after deploy (e.g. https://your-app-name.herokuapp.com). Leave blank to auto-detect.

WELCOME_DELETE_AFTER.description: Seconds before the welcome message auto-deletes. Default is 600 (10 minutes).

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'Bot deployed! Make sure WEBHOOK_URL is set to your Heroku app URL.'
